title: Emerald & Ruby Tools Armor
description: Make Emerald & Ruby usable as Tools and Armor
body:
**Make Emerald and Ruby usable as tools and armor. Emerald and Ruby also have special effects.**

---------

<center>

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e13eede26c07874217207b9e37a2449616997ab2.png)

 # Armor and Tools
  
![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

### Basic Emerald and Emerald

![emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7a6dec2f128443fce9c3f2aeff94aca14ed696c.png)

### Basic Ruby and Ruby

![ruby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec4e9d9dfdbcd440705a576f556a594ef6d3b05.png)

### Ruby & Emerald Block

![rne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e070739045e29955793791428d47250d92ab30fb.png)

### Toggle on/off Special Effect

Tools Effect [V]
Armor Effect [B]

![toggle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc23f5c1c111c326f4c29c628d57d015edaba53e.gif)

![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22bc3b74a095f1860e0c826130a5b775016e49b3.png)

# Tools with special effect

<details>
  <summary>Emerald</summary>

### Emerald Axe

**Tree Chopper**

![eaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ee2f4eb98755bb81b3215f72372404a550eaaad.gif)

---------

### Emerald Hoe

**Auto-Replant**

![ehoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/425bb2f440d89b4d911a4fb07e3e741af39c774a.gif)

---------

### Emerald Pickaxe

**Auto Smelt**

![epickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73ec4078bff567096f85c464a85b6e654e04abdf.gif)

---------

### Emerald Shovel

**Anti-Gravity**

---------

### Emerald Sword

**Shockwave**

![esword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d0cc56ae26e834367d1b2493284a8897849992e.gif)

![ehorse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec0d55bdb5f8fda8c27347131935cdc646bb5b3.gif)

</details>

<details>
  <summary>Ruby</summary>

### Ruby Axe

**Tree Chopper + Auto Place**

![raxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a138d9d5b83285dfe9c176cf92e95f9f02041434.gif)

---------

### Ruby Hoe

**Auto-Replant + More Harvest**

![rhoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/957b73257822bb0e1ac0faa4d47100ccb8b25f67.gif)

---------

### Ruby Pickaxe

**Auto Smelt + Vein Mining**

![rpickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b19af3c2caf26186c5fa50613ec35b9bfc12a04.gif)

---------

### Ruby Shovel

  **Anti-Gravity + Fast Digging**

![rshovel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bc6535724b49f7574de64f8345d1b2866dd9f7b.gif)

---------

### Ruby Sword

**Shockwave + Lighting Slash**

![rsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dab94cd5827241184ca7b484c5c8fb18dbabf5fd.gif)

---------

### Ruby Horse armor

![rhorse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2224ce96af8294bd8cb025ca4d94c5cfa1bc69e6.gif)

</details>

### New Item

**Apple, Carrot and Totem**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b9d0cea901338583df12cbb912dc959bac397ba.png)

![carrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bea18d9edf29ee1f4530d38a359f16c6d9431501.png)

**I highly recommend you to use the [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) mod**

</center>
